subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from God unto those who have shattered the idols of self through the fear of God and have preserved the divine trusts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من الله الی الذین هم کسروا اصنام انفسهم بتقوی الله و حفظوا امانات
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
